headline: Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO: Report

article.title: Kraken cuts 150 staff amid AI efficiencies, potentially delaying IPO: Report
article.summary: Kraken has cut 150 staff due to the rising use of AI, adding to more than 5,000 layoffs across the crypto sector so far this year, Bloomberg reports.

headline: Verus Ethereum bridge reportedly exploited for $11.6M in latest DeFi attack

article.title: Verus Ethereum bridge reportedly exploited for $11.6M in latest DeFi attack
article.summary: Two security companies have flagged the address where the stolen funds are allegedly being held, showing the cryptocurrencies have been converted into 5,402 Ether.

headline: US Fuels Hopes for Wider China Crop Trade, Lifting Grain Prices

article.title: US Fuels Hopes for Wider China Crop Trade, Lifting Grain Prices
article.summary: An agreement on US agricultural sales to China outlined by the White House is raising optimism for a pickup beyond soybeans, further reviving crop flows that have been weighed down by trade tensions.

headline: India Can Ride Out Disruption After Russian Oil Waiver Lapse

article.title: India Can Ride Out Disruption After Russian Oil Waiver Lapse
article.summary: India’s oil refiners are expected to weather disruption in supply after the US allowed its waiver on Russian crude purchases to expire, thanks to weaker demand and available barrels from the US and the Middle East.
